message:
feat(command,runtime): support multi-section INFO, track save timestamps, and fix MEMORY errors

INFO command:
- Refactor to support multiple section arguments (e.g., INFO server
  clients memory) instead of single section only
- Add section_requested() helper for clean section filtering

Persistence:
- Add store.mark_saved_at(now_ms) to track last save timestamp
- Report actual rdb_last_save_time in INFO persistence instead of
  hardcoded 0

Error handling:
- Change unknown MEMORY subcommand to SyntaxError for Redis compat

Tests: multi-section INFO and persistence timestamp validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
